# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy_staging
  - deploy_production

default:
  interruptible: true

variables:
  ARTIFACT_EXPIRE_IN: 30 days

build_app:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:3.19
  script:
    - mkdir -p dist/bin dist/config
    - echo '#!/bin/sh' > dist/bin/app
    - echo 'echo "Running built application"' >> dist/bin/app
    - chmod +x dist/bin/app
    - echo 'APP_ENV=shared' > dist/config/app.env
    - echo 'LOG_LEVEL=info' >> dist/config/app.env
    - tar -czf dist/package.tar.gz -C dist bin config
  artifacts:
    name: "build-$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA"
    expire_in: $ARTIFACT_EXPIRE_IN
    paths:
      - dist/bin/
      - dist/config/
      - dist/package.tar.gz

test_artifacts:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:3.19
  needs:
    - job: build_app
      artifacts: true
  dependencies:
    - build_app
  script:
    - test -f dist/package.tar.gz
    - test -x dist/bin/app
    - . dist/config/app.env
    - ./dist/bin/app

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy_staging
  image: alpine:3.19
  needs:
    - job: build_app
      artifacts: true
  dependencies:
    - build_app
  environment:
    name: staging
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to staging"
    - tar -xzf dist/package.tar.gz -C /tmp
    - . /tmp/config/app.env
    - /tmp/bin/app
    - echo "Deployment to staging completed"

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy_production
  image: alpine:3.19
  needs:
    - job: build_app
      artifacts: true
  dependencies:
    - build_app
  environment:
    name: production
  when: manual
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production"
    - tar -xzf dist/package.tar.gz -C /tmp
    - . /tmp/config/app.env
    - /tmp/bin/app
    - echo "Deployment to production completed"
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"'
      when: manual
    - when: never
